2605.27258.title: PilotTTS: A Disciplined Modular Recipe for Competitive Speech Synthesis
2605.27258.paper_summary: Building state-of-the-art text-to-speech (TTS) systems typically demands millions of hours of proprietary data and complex multi-stage architectures, creating substantial barriers for resource-constrained research teams. In this report, we present PilotTTS, a lightweight autoregressive TTS system that achieves competitive performance through minimalist architecture and rigorous data engineering. PilotTTS is trained on only 200K hours of data processed entirely with open-source tools. Specifically, our contributions are: (1) a reproducible multi-stage data processing pipeline covering quality assessment, label annotation, and filtering, and (2) a compact model architecture that employs Q-Former-based conditioning to decouple speaker identity from speaking style via cross-sample paired training. Within a unified framework, PilotTTS supports zero-shot voice cloning, emotion synthesis (11 categories), paralinguistic synthesis (4 categories), and Chinese dialect synthesis (14 dialects). On the Seed-TTS Eval benchmark, PilotTTS achieves the lowest WER of 1.50% on test-en, a CER of 0.87% on test-zh, and the highest speaker similarity on both test sets (0.862 and 0.815), outperforming systems trained on significantly larger datasets. We release the complete data pipeline recipe, pretrained weights, and code at https://github.com/AMAPVOICE/PilotTTS.
2605.27258.paper_summary_zh: 建立最先進的文本轉語音 (TTS) 系統通常需要數百萬小時的專有數據和複雜的多階段架構，這對資源有限的研究團隊造成了相當大的障礙。在本報告中，我們介紹了 PilotTTS，一個輕量級自回歸 TTS 系統，通過簡約的架構和嚴謹的數據工程實現了具有競爭力的性能。PilotTTS 僅使用 200K 小時的數據進行訓練，這些數據完全使用開源工具處理。具體而言，我們的貢獻包括：(1) 一個可重現的多階段數據處理管道，涵蓋質量評估、標籤註釋和過濾，以及 (2) 一個緊湊的模型架構，利用基於 Q-Former 的條件化來通過跨樣本配對訓練將說話者身份與說話風格解耦。在統一的框架內，PilotTTS 支持零樣本語音克隆、情感合成（11 類）、副語言合成（4 類）和中文方言合成（14 種方言）。在 Seed-TTS Eval 基準測試中，PilotTTS 在 test-en 上達到了最低的 WER 1.50%，在 test-zh 上的 CER 為 0.87%，並且在兩個測試集上都達到了最高的說話者相似度（0.862 和 0.815），超越了在顯著更大數據集上訓練的系統。我們在 https://github.com/AMAPVOICE/PilotTTS 上發布了完整的數據管道配方、預訓練權重和代碼。
2605.27258.author: Bowen Li et.al.
2605.27258.authors: Bowen Li, Shaotong Guo, Zhen Wang, Yang Xiang, Mingli Jin, Yihang Lin, Jiahui Zhao, Weibo Xiong, Dongrui Li, Keming Chen, Yunze Gao, Yuze Zhou, Zeyang Lin, Yue Liu
